title: Tesla to invest $250 million in battery plant outside Berlin
summary: electric car maker Tesla will ‌invest almost $250 million in ‌ramping up battery cell production capacity at ​its factory outside Berlin, in a move set to boost jobs in the area and strengthen ‌its supply ⁠chain, the company said on Tuesday. The investment is ⁠intended to create the conditions for annual production capacity of ​18 gigawatt ​hours at ​the site in ‌Gruenheide, south-east of the German capital, up from a previous 8 GWh, a statement said.
